title: Phase 5 Correction Plan Index
description: Comprehensive correction plan addressing Phase 4 blocking items and Phase 5 testing/CI requirements

critical_blockers.title: Critical Blockers (Must fix before Phase 5 testing)

validation_criteria.sprint_1: Flutter and ML successfully integrated with backend; all endpoints accessible
validation_criteria.sprint_2: 100% endpoint coverage in tests; >80% code coverage; all tests passing
validation_criteria.sprint_3: CI pipeline functional; automated testing on every commit; branch protection enabled
validation_criteria.sprint_4: Production configs documented; monitoring setup verified; security review complete
